scripts.build:packages: bun run --filter '@dryui/lint' build && bun run --filter '@dryui/primitives' build && bun run --filter '@dryui/ui' build && bun run --filter '@dryui/feedback' build && bun run --filter '@dryui/theme-wizard' build && bun run --filter '@dryui/mcp' build && bun run --filter '@dryui/feedback-server' build && bun run --filter '@dryui/cli' build
scripts.build:docs: bun run build:packages && bun run docs:build
scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run build:docs
scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:browser
scripts.test:coverage: bun run test:coverage:unit && bun run test:coverage:browser && bun run coverage:summary
scripts.check:packages: bun run --filter '@dryui/primitives' check && bun run --filter '@dryui/ui' check
scripts.check:contract: bun run scripts/check-generated-files.ts "bun run --filter '@dryui/mcp' generate-spec && bun run --filter '@dryui/mcp' generate-contract" packages/mcp/src/spec.json packages/mcp/src/contract.v1.json packages/mcp/src/contract.v1.schema.json
scripts.check:docs:llms: bun run scripts/check-generated-files.ts "bun run --filter '@dryui/mcp' generate-llms" llms.txt apps/docs/static/llms.txt apps/docs/static/llms-components.txt
scripts.check: bun run check:exports && bun run check:packages && bun run check:docs && bun run check:docs:demos && bun run check:contract && bun run check:docs:llms && bun run check:mcp && bun run check:feedback-server && bun run check:cli:types && bun run check:lint:violations
scripts.version: changeset version && bun update && bun run --filter '@dryui/mcp' generate-spec && bun run --filter '@dryui/mcp' generate-architecture && bun run --filter '@dryui/mcp' generate-contract && bun run --filter '@dryui/mcp' generate-llms
scripts.release: bun run release:gate && bun run version && bun run publish:packages
